page_metadata.biotools__summary: Integrated gene ontology analysis toolkit for the agriculture community. Supported organisms and gene identifiers were expanded over EasyGO tool, and several tools for predicting gene function are included.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Integrated gene ontology analysis toolkit for the agriculture community. Supported organisms and gene identifiers were expanded over EasyGO tool, and several tools for predicting gene function are included.
